mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_checklist_result_master ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT * FROM tb_checklist_result_master WHERE title LIKE '%' + #{title} + '%' ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_checklist_result_master WHERE title LIKE '%' + #{title} + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_checklist_result_master ( title, check_date, checker, check_manager, facility_manager, template_id, reg_user, mod_user, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{checkDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{checker}, #{checkManager}, #{facilityManager}, #{templateId}, #{regUser}, #{modUser}, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_checklist_result_master SET title = #{title}, check_date = #{checkDate,jdbcType=DATE}, checker = #{checker}, check_manager = #{checkManager}, facility_manager = #{facilityManager}, template_id = #{templateId}, mod_user = #{modUser}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
